title: [3.14] gh-146092: Handle _PyFrame_GetFrameObject() failures properly (#146124)
author: vstinner
body:
* Fix _PyFrame_GetLocals() and _PyFrame_GetLocals() error handling.
* _PyEval_ExceptionGroupMatch() now fails on _PyFrame_GetLocals() error.

(cherry picked from commit e1e4852133ea548479bc9b975420a32331df7cee)
